name: calendar-workspace
title: Agent-Native Calendar Workspace
description: Agent-Native Calendar Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/calendar"
        },
        {
          "label": "Availability",
          "route": "/calendar/availability"
        },
        {
          "label": "Booking Links Detail",
          "route": "/calendar/booking-links/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Booking Links Index",
          "route": "/calendar/booking-links"
        },
        {
          "label": "Booking Links",
          "route": "/calendar/booking-links"
        },
        {
          "label": "Bookings",
          "route": "/calendar/bookings"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/calendar/extensions/:id/:slug"
        }

    },
